But behind this progress is an unsustainable reliance on low pay and poor working conditions, particularly for women.Does Bangladesh have a ready-made garment industry?In particular,the ready-made garment (RMG) sector occupies an outsized position in Bangladesh’s economy– and by extension, in the national imagination. Widely regarded as the engine of development, the rise of the RMG industry was meteoric. In 1983-84, apparel accounted for less than 4% of total Bangladeshi exports.Is Bangladesh preparing for LDC graduation in 2026?Since Bangladesh is the largest exporter by value among the LDCs, Bangladesh is projected to experience the most substantial reduction of $ 5.37 billion in value among all the graduating countries (Figure 3). Despite the growth of its RMG sector, one of the most pressing issues isthe country’s impending LDC graduation in 2026.What is Bangladesh's role in the textile and clothing industry?The textile and clothing industry is one themain sources of Bangladesh’s recent economic growth and development. In particular, the ready-made garment (RMG) sector occupies an outsized position in Bangladesh’s economy – and by extension, in the national imagination.Does Bangladesh have a fast fashion industry?That’s no small amount when fast fashion exports account for80% of Bangladesh’s export earnings.
